experiment_1_single_hash.description: Empirical Pr[random hyperplane agrees] vs theory 1 - theta/pi
experiment_1_single_hash.verdict_rule: max |empirical - theory| / stderr < 5.0 across all (theta, dim) points

experiment_2_and_or_threshold.description: Empirical AND-OR (k, L) LSH recall S-curve vs theory 1-(1-p^k)^L
experiment_2_and_or_threshold.verdict_rule: threshold error < 0.08 rad AND max curve abs error < 0.08

experiment_3_scaling.description: Fitted exponent of mean LSH candidate-set size vs n, compared to Indyk-Motwani rho = ln(1/p1)/ln(1/p2). Run twice: 'promise' pins every background point at exactly far_theta (isolates the theorem); 'iid' uses realistic i.i.d. random background (subject to order-statistics drift as n grows -- see data.py docstring).
experiment_3_scaling.verdict_rule: (promise-preserving variant) |rho_fitted - rho_theory| / rho_theory < 0.25 AND R^2 > 0.8. The iid variant is reported as a secondary, real-world finding and is not part of the pass/fail rule.
